title: Fix argument mismatch in process fork

features.name: process member with fork/join_none calling virtual method
features.description: Code should include a class with a protected process member, a fork/join_none block that calls a virtual method override, where that override calls another virtual method that loses its process argument

features.name: virtual method override calling parent virtual method inside fork
features.description: Code should include a virtual method override that calls a parent virtual method, invoked from within a fork/join_none context
